Chromosomal copy number analysis (ichorCNA sWGS)

2025-09-02

arm_colors <- c("arm_A" = "#4E79A7", "arm_B" = "#F28E2B")
arm_labels  <- c("arm_A" = "Combination (AI + CDK4/6i)", "arm_B" = "Monotherapy (AI)")

timepoint_colors           <- c("BL" = "#A6C8E0", "PD" = "#4E79A7")
timepoint_labels           <- c("BL" = "Baseline",  "PD" = "Progression")
timepoint_both_arms_colors <- c("arm_A_BL" = "#A6C8E0", "arm_A_PD" = "#4E79A7",
                                "arm_B_BL" = "#F8C99B", "arm_B_PD" = "#F28E2B")
timepoint_both_arms_labels <- c("arm_A_BL" = "Baseline (combination treatment)",
                                "arm_A_PD" = "Progression (combination treatment)",
                                "arm_B_BL" = "Baseline (monotherapy)",
                                "arm_B_PD" = "Progression (monotherapy)")
cnCall_colors <- c("GAIN" = "#F46D43", "LOSS" = "#6BAED6")

chr_order <- paste0("chr", c(1:22, "X", "Y"))

Tumor fraction estimates

estimatesIchorCNA_sonia |>
    distinct(patnr, arm, timepoint, sampleName_shWGS, tumorFractionEstimate) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = timepoint, y = tumorFractionEstimate, fill = timepoint)) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_line(aes(group = patnr), alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_point(size = 1.8, alpha = 0.7) +
    facet_wrap(~arm, labeller = labeller(arm = arm_labels)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = timepoint_colors, labels = timepoint_labels) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = timepoint_labels) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
    labs(
        title = "Tumor fraction estimates at baseline and progression",
        subtitle = "Lines connect paired baseline-progression samples",
        x     = NULL,
        y     = "Tumor fraction (ichorCNA)",
        fill  = "Timepoint"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )

ggsave("results/figures/ichorCNA_tumor_fraction.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 4.5)

Aggregated chromosomal copy number profiles

samples_per_group <- estimatesIchorCNA_sonia |>
    distinct(patnr, arm, timepoint) |>
    group_by(arm, timepoint) |>
    summarise(n_samples = n(), .groups = "drop")

cn_calls_binned <- estimatesIchorCNA_sonia |>
    mutate(
        cn_call = case_when(
            Corrected_Call %in% c("GAIN", "AMP", "HLAMP", "HLAMP2") ~ "GAIN",
            Corrected_Call == "HETD"                                 ~ "LOSS",
            .default = NA
        )
    ) |>
    filter(!is.na(cn_call)) |>
    group_by(seqnames, start, bins, cn_call, arm, timepoint) |>
    summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    left_join(samples_per_group, by = join_by(arm, timepoint)) |>
    mutate(freq = count / n_samples)

bin_order <- estimatesIchorCNA_sonia |>
    distinct(seqnames, start, bins) |>
    mutate(seqnames = factor(seqnames, levels = chr_order)) |>
    arrange(seqnames, start) |>
    tibble::rowid_to_column("bin_id")
chr_bounds <- bin_order |>
    group_by(seqnames) |>
    summarise(chr_start = min(bin_id), chr_end = max(bin_id), .groups = "drop") |>
    mutate(
        chr_mid   = (chr_start + chr_end) / 2,
        chr_label = gsub("chr", "", seqnames),
        chr_idx   = row_number(),
        is_even   = chr_idx %% 2 == 0
    )

chr_shading <- chr_bounds |>
    filter(is_even) |>
    select(xmin = chr_start, xmax = chr_end)

cn_calls_binned |>
    right_join(bin_order, by = join_by(seqnames, start, bins)) |>
    tidyr::replace_na(list(freq = 0)) |>
    mutate(
        freq = ifelse(cn_call == "LOSS", -freq, freq),
        cn_call = tidyr::replace_na(cn_call, "GAIN"),
        facet_label = paste0(
            ifelse(arm == "arm_A", "Combination", "Monotherapy"), " – ",
            ifelse(timepoint == "BL", "Baseline", "Progression")
        )
    ) |>
    filter(!is.na(arm), !is.na(timepoint)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = bin_id, y = freq, fill = cn_call)) +
    geom_rect(
        data        = chr_shading,
        aes(xmin = xmin - 0.5, xmax = xmax + 0.5, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
        inherit.aes = FALSE, fill = "grey92", alpha = 0.5
    ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey40") +
    geom_col(width = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~facet_label, ncol = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cnCall_colors, labels = c("GAIN" = "Gain", "LOSS" = "Loss")) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = chr_bounds$chr_mid,
        labels = chr_bounds$chr_label,
        expand = c(0.005, 0)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
        breaks = seq(-1, 1, 0.25),
        labels = function(x) paste0(abs(x) * 100, "%"),
        expand = c(0, 0)
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-1, 1)) +
    labs(
        title = "Aggregated chromosomal copy number profiles at baseline and progression",
        x     = "Chromosome",
        y     = "Frequency",
        fill  = NULL
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 9),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )

ggsave("results/figures/ichorCNA_cn_frequency_genome.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 14, height = 8)

Genome fraction affected by chromosomal CNAs

genome_affected <- estimatesIchorCNA_sonia |>
    group_by(patnr, arm, timepoint, Corrected_Call) |>
    summarize(n_bins = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    group_by(patnr, arm, timepoint) |>
    mutate(total_bins = sum(n_bins)) |>
    ungroup() |>
    filter(Corrected_Call == "NEUT") |>
    mutate(perc_affected = 1 - n_bins / total_bins)
genome_affected |>
    group_by(arm, timepoint) |>
    summarize(
        mean_pct   = mean(perc_affected),
        median_pct = median(perc_affected),
        min_pct    = min(perc_affected),
        max_pct    = max(perc_affected),
        .groups    = "drop"
    )
## # A tibble: 4 × 6
##   arm   timepoint mean_pct median_pct min_pct max_pct
##   <chr> <chr>        <dbl>      <dbl>   <dbl>   <dbl>
## 1 arm_A BL           0.382      0.335  0.0379   0.776
## 2 arm_A PD           0.407      0.382  0.0585   0.748
## 3 arm_B BL           0.347      0.370  0        0.612
## 4 arm_B PD           0.488      0.539  0.0667   0.893
genome_affected_wide <- genome_affected |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = timepoint, values_from = c(perc_affected, n_bins, total_bins))

cat("Arm A — Wilcoxon BL vs PD (% genome affected):\n")
## Arm A — Wilcoxon BL vs PD (% genome affected):
wilcox.test(
    genome_affected_wide$perc_affected_BL[genome_affected_wide$arm == "arm_A"],
    genome_affected_wide$perc_affected_PD[genome_affected_wide$arm == "arm_A"]
)
## 
##  Wilcoxon rank sum test with continuity correction
## 
## data:  genome_affected_wide$perc_affected_BL[genome_affected_wide$arm == "arm_A"] and genome_affected_wide$perc_affected_PD[genome_affected_wide$arm == "arm_A"]
## W = 185, p-value = 0.6949
## alternative hypothesis: true location shift is not equal to 0
cat("Arm B — Wilcoxon BL vs PD (% genome affected):\n")
## Arm B — Wilcoxon BL vs PD (% genome affected):
wilcox.test(
    genome_affected_wide$perc_affected_BL[genome_affected_wide$arm == "arm_B"],
    genome_affected_wide$perc_affected_PD[genome_affected_wide$arm == "arm_B"]
)
## 
##  Wilcoxon rank sum exact test
## 
## data:  genome_affected_wide$perc_affected_BL[genome_affected_wide$arm == "arm_B"] and genome_affected_wide$perc_affected_PD[genome_affected_wide$arm == "arm_B"]
## W = 59, p-value = 0.07666
## alternative hypothesis: true location shift is not equal to 0
genome_affected |>
    ggplot(aes(x = timepoint, y = perc_affected, fill = timepoint)) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_line(aes(group = patnr), alpha = 0.3, linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_point(size = 1.8, alpha = 0.7) +
    facet_wrap(~arm, labeller = labeller(arm = arm_labels)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = timepoint_colors, labels = timepoint_labels) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = timepoint_labels) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
    labs(
        title    = "Percentage of genome affected by chromosomal CNAs",
        subtitle = "Lines connect paired baseline-progression samples",
        x        = NULL,
        y        = "Genome affected",
        fill     = "Timepoint"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )

ggsave("results/figures/ichorCNA_genome_affected_boxplot.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 4.5)
genome_affected |>
    mutate(timepoint_arm = paste0(arm, "_", timepoint)) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = patnr, y = perc_affected, fill = timepoint_arm)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = timepoint_both_arms_colors, labels = timepoint_both_arms_labels) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
    facet_grid(~arm, scales = "free", space = "free", labeller = labeller(arm = arm_labels)) +
    labs(
        title = "Genome affected by chromosomal copy number alterations per patient",
        x     = "Patient ID",
        y     = "Genome affected",
        fill  = NULL
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )

ggsave("results/figures/ichorCNA_genome_affected_per_patient.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 9, height = 5)
genome_affected_wide |>
    ggplot(aes(x = perc_affected_BL, y = perc_affected_PD, color = arm)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "grey50", linetype = "dashed") +
    facet_grid(~arm, labeller = labeller(arm = arm_labels)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = arm_colors) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(
        title = "Genome affected: baseline vs progression",
        x     = "Baseline",
        y     = "Progression",
        color = "Treatment arm"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "none",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )

ggsave("results/figures/ichorCNA_genome_affected_scatter.pdf", plot = last_plot(), width = 7, height = 4)

Chromosomal CNA oncoplot at progression

chromosomal_copy_number_colors <- c(
    "acquired_gain"      = "#D08159",
    "stable_gain"        = "#F2A97F",
    "acquired_loss"      = "#8E6BAF",
    "stable_loss"        = "#C7AEDB",
    "loss_of_alteration" = "#D3D3D3"
)
chromosomal_copy_number_labels <- c(
    "stable_loss"        = "Stable loss",
    "acquired_loss"      = "Acquired loss",
    "stable_gain"        = "Stable gain",
    "acquired_gain"      = "Acquired gain",
    "loss_of_alteration" = "Loss of alteration"
)
chromosome_ordering <- tibble::tibble(
    chromosome_ordering = 1:24,
    seqnames            = paste0("chr", c(1:22, "X", "Y"))
)
chromosomal_cn_annotation <- estimatesIchorCNA_sonia |>
    filter(timepoint == "PD", !is.na(Corrected_Call)) |>
    mutate(
        Corrected_Call = ifelse(
            Corrected_Call %in% c("HLAMP", "HLAMP2", "HLAMP3"), "AMP", Corrected_Call
        )
    ) |>
    group_by(patnr, arm, timepoint, sampleName_shWGS, seqnames) |>
    summarize(median_cn = median(Corrected_Copy_Number), n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    mutate(median_cn = ifelse(patnr == "145" & seqnames == "chr1", 3, median_cn)) |>
    left_join(emerged_chromosomal_cnas, by = join_by(patnr, arm, seqnames)) |>
    mutate(chr_call = case_when(
        median_cn == 1 & is.na(cna_type)    ~ "stable_loss",
        median_cn == 2 & is.na(cna_type)    ~ "neutral",
        median_cn >= 3 & is.na(cna_type)    ~ "stable_gain",
        median_cn == 1 & cna_type == "loss" ~ "acquired_loss",
        median_cn >= 3 & cna_type == "gain" ~ "acquired_gain",
        median_cn == 2 & return_to_diploid  ~ "loss_of_alteration"
    )) |>
    filter(chr_call != "neutral")

patient_order_chromosomal_cna <- chromosomal_cn_annotation |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    summarize(n_chromosomal_cna = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
    arrange(n_chromosomal_cna) |>
    tibble::rowid_to_column(var = "patient_ordering") |>
    left_join(meta_data, by = join_by(patnr)) |>
    select(patnr, arm, patient_ordering) |>
    distinct()
chromosomal_copy_number_oncoplot <- chromosomal_cn_annotation |>
    left_join(patient_order_chromosomal_cna, by = join_by(patnr, arm)) |>
    left_join(chromosome_ordering, by = join_by(seqnames)) |>
    mutate(arm = factor(arm, levels = c("arm_B", "arm_A"))) |>
    ggplot(aes(
        x = reorder(patnr, patient_ordering, decreasing = TRUE),
        y = reorder(seqnames, chromosome_ordering, decreasing = TRUE)
    )) +
    geom_tile(aes(fill = as.factor(chr_call)), na.rm = TRUE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.1) +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(median_cn, 2)), color = "white", size = 2.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(
        values       = chromosomal_copy_number_colors,
        labels       = chromosomal_copy_number_labels,
        na.translate = TRUE
    ) +
    facet_grid(~arm, scales = "free", space = "free", labeller = labeller(arm = arm_labels)) +
    labs(
        title = "Retained and acquired chromosomal copy number alterations at progression",
        x     = "Patient ID",
        y     = "Chromosomes",
        fill  = "Alterations"
    ) +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "bottom",
        legend.direction = "horizontal",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    ) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = FALSE))

chromosomal_copy_number_oncoplot

ggsave("results/figures/ichorCNA_chromosomal_cna_oncoplot.pdf", plot = chromosomal_copy_number_oncoplot, width = 9, height = 6)
percentage_labels_chromosomal_cn <- chromosomal_cn_annotation |>
    left_join(chromosome_ordering, by = join_by(seqnames)) |>
    group_by(arm, seqnames, chromosome_ordering, chr_call) |>
    summarize(n_per_arm = length(unique(patnr)), .groups = "drop") |>
    mutate(perc = round(ifelse(arm == "arm_A", n_per_arm / 20, -n_per_arm / 14) * 100)) |>
    group_by(seqnames, arm, chromosome_ordering) |>
    summarize(perc_total = round(sum(perc)), .groups = "drop") |>
    mutate(
        perc_label = paste0(abs(perc_total), "%"),
        x          = ifelse(arm == "arm_A", perc_total + 15, perc_total - 12)
    )

chromosomal_copy_number_frequency <- chromosomal_cn_annotation |>
    left_join(chromosome_ordering, by = join_by(seqnames)) |>
    group_by(arm, seqnames, chromosome_ordering, chr_call) |>
    summarize(n_per_arm = length(unique(patnr)), .groups = "drop") |>
    mutate(perc = round(ifelse(arm == "arm_A", n_per_arm / 20, -n_per_arm / 14) * 100)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_bar(
        aes(y = reorder(seqnames, chromosome_ordering, decreasing = TRUE), x = perc, fill = chr_call),
        stat = "identity"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-100, 100)) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(-100, -50, 0, 50, 100),
        labels = c("100%", "50%", "0%", "50%", "100%")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = chromosomal_copy_number_colors, labels = chromosomal_copy_number_labels) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_text(
        data = percentage_labels_chromosomal_cn,
        aes(x = x, y = reorder(seqnames, chromosome_ordering, decreasing = FALSE), label = perc_label),
        size = 3
    ) +
    labs(x = "% patients", y = "", fill = "") +
    theme_light() +
    theme(
        legend.position  = "none",
        text             = element_text(size = 9, family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y      = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x      = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 9),
        axis.title.x     = ggtext::element_textbox_simple(width = NULL, halign = .5),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
        strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
        axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold")
    )

chromosomal_copy_number_frequency

ggsave("results/figures/ichorCNA_chromosomal_cna_frequency.pdf", plot = chromosomal_copy_number_frequency, width = 4, height = 6)
chromosomal_copy_number_combined <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
    chromosomal_copy_number_oncoplot,
    chromosomal_copy_number_frequency,
    design = "AAAAAAAAAABBB#"
)
chromosomal_copy_number_combined

ggsave("results/figures/ichorCNA_chromosomal_cna_combined.pdf", plot = chromosomal_copy_number_combined, width = 9, height = 6)
